zh: 俗話說「人是帶水米投胎的」、
en: As the old saying goes, "a child grows on its own without help,"

zh: 意即不用教不用管孩子自己會自我長大、
en: meaning no teaching or discipline is needed — they'll grow up by themselves.
But this is simply not true.

zh: 孩子除了成長外必須要有目標、
en: Beyond simply growing, children need goals,

zh: 而目標的達成就需要不斷的鞭策、不斷的導引、
en: and reaching those goals requires continuous nudging and guidance.

zh: 父母親的職責也就是要引導孩子們、
en: The duty of parents is precisely to guide their children,

zh: 從小就往正確的方向成長。
en: steering them in the right direction from an early age.
